# Oliver Aleksander Larsen — Software Architecture Researcher

> Software architecture researcher at the University of Southern Denmark (SDU)
> studying how architecture adapts when AI becomes both a design tool and a
> design subject. Four papers accepted at IEEE ICSA 2026 (Amsterdam).

## Research Areas
- Software Architecture for AI-Augmented Systems
- Edge Computing and IoT
- AI Governance and EU AI Act Compliance
- Blockchain Architecture (Bitcoin-native)
- LLM-Driven Middleware and Interoperability

## Papers at IEEE ICSA 2026
- Edge-Based Standing-Water Detection via FSM-Guided Tiering and Multi-Model Consensus (In Practice Track)
- RAD-AI: Rethinking Architecture Documentation for AI-Augmented Ecosystems (ANGE Workshop)
- BitSov: A Composable Bitcoin-Native Architecture for Sovereign Internet Infrastructure (BlockArch Workshop)
- SAGAI-MID: A Generative AI-Driven Middleware for Dynamic Runtime Interoperability (SAGAI Workshop)

## Links
- Home: https://oliver1703dk.github.io/
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0003-6944-2560
- GitHub: https://github.com/Oliver1703dk
